verse: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.
The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the Lord your God will be with you wherever you go.
The Lord bless you and keep you; the Lord make his face shine on you and be gracious to you.
Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble.
For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.
I can do all this through him who gives me strength.
And we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love him.
The Lord is my light and my salvation — whom shall I fear?
Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God.
Love is patient, love is kind. It does not envy, it does not boast, it is not proud.
But those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength. They will soar on wings like eagles.
Your word is a lamp for my feet, a light on my path.
Be still, and know that I am God.
Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
The heart of man plans his way, but the Lord establishes his steps.
For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them.
The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.
Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good; his love endures forever.
Seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.
He gives strength to the weary and increases the power of the weak.
Even though I walk through the darkest valley, I will fear no evil, for you are with me.
No eye has seen, no ear has heard, no mind has conceived what God has prepared for those who love him.
The Lord your God is with you, the Mighty Warrior who saves. He will take great delight in you.
I have been crucified with Christ and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me.
Ask and it will be given to you; seek and you will find; knock and the door will be opened to you.
The name of the Lord is a fortified tower; the righteous run to it and are safe.
This is the day the Lord has made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.
Create in me a pure heart, O God, and renew a steadfast spirit within me.
The Lord is good, a refuge in times of trouble. He cares for those who trust in him.
Let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in heaven.
I praise you because I am fearfully and wonderfully made.
Greater is he who is in you than he who is in the world.
Do to others as you would have them do to you.
For the Spirit God gave us does not make us timid, but gives us power, love and self-discipline.
Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart.
With God nothing will be impossible.
The steadfast love of the Lord never ceases; his mercies never come to an end.
He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds.
Let us not become weary in doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up.
Rejoice always, pray continually, give thanks in all circumstances.
We love because he first loved us.
The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusts in him, and he helps me.
Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.
Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, since as members of one body you were called to peace.
The Lord is my portion; therefore I will wait for him.
In him we live and move and have our being.
If God is for us, who can be against us?
I will lift up my eyes to the mountains — where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord.
Now faith is confidence in what we hope for and assurance about what we do not see.
The Lord directs the steps of the godly. He delights in every detail of their lives.
May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace as you trust in him.
The Lord is gracious and compassionate, slow to anger and rich in love.
Jesus said, I am the way and the truth and the life.
He who began a good work in you will carry it on to completion until the day of Christ Jesus.
Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you. Do not let your hearts be troubled.
The Lord makes firm the steps of the one who delights in him.
Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, the new creation has come: the old has gone, the new is here!
The Lord is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer; my God is my rock, in whom I take refuge.
But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.
Commit your way to the Lord; trust in him and he will do this.
I will praise the Lord, who counsels me; even at night my heart instructs me.
The joy of the Lord is your strength.
For it is by grace you have been saved, through faith — and this is not from yourselves, it is the gift of God.
She is clothed with strength and dignity; she can laugh at the days to come.
The Lord is righteous in all his ways and faithful in all he does.
Therefore do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about itself.
Let us then approach God's throne of grace with confidence, so that we may receive mercy.
Blessed is the one who trusts in the Lord, whose confidence is in him.
My soul finds rest in God alone; my salvation comes from him.
But God demonstrates his own love for us in this: While we were still sinners, Christ died for us.
Show me your ways, Lord, teach me your paths.
The Lord is not slow in keeping his promise, as some understand slowness.
Taste and see that the Lord is good; blessed is the one who takes refuge in him.
God is within her, she will not fall; God will help her at break of day.
For the Lord God is a sun and shield; the Lord bestows favor and honor.
I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
The Lord bless you and keep you; the Lord make his face shine on you.
Give, and it will be given to you. A good measure, pressed down, shaken together and running over.
Surely goodness and love will follow me all the days of my life.
He will cover you with his feathers, and under his wings you will find refuge.
I am the resurrection and the life. The one who believes in me will live, even though they die.
Praise the Lord, my soul, and forget not all his benefits.
The Lord your God is in your midst, a mighty one who will save.
For the word of God is alive and active, sharper than any double-edged sword.
Jesus wept. And the Jews said, See how he loved him!
But as for me, I watch in hope for the Lord, I wait for God my Savior.
The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing. He makes me lie down in green pastures.
He is not here; he has risen, just as he said.
Thanks be to God! He gives us the victory through our Lord Jesus Christ.
And God raised us up with Christ and seated us with him in the heavenly realms.
The Lord has done it this very day; let us rejoice today and be glad.
But thanks be to God, who always leads us as captives in Christ's triumphal procession.
Your love, Lord, reaches to the heavens, your faithfulness to the skies.
He has made everything beautiful in its time. He has also set eternity in the human heart.
And my God will meet all your needs according to the riches of his glory in Christ Jesus.
With man this is impossible, but with God all things are possible.
He restores my soul. He leads me in paths of righteousness for his name's sake.
The Lord is trustworthy in all he promises and faithful in all he does.
You will seek me and find me when you seek me with all your heart.
Let the message of Christ dwell among you richly.
My strength is dried up like a potsherd, but you, O Lord, are my strength and my song.
So do not fear, for I am with you; do not be dismayed, for I am your God.
Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
The Lord gives wisdom; from his mouth come knowledge and understanding.
Come near to God and he will come near to you.
Now to him who is able to do immeasurably more than all we ask or imagine.
God is love. Whoever lives in love lives in God, and God in them.
You are the light of the world. A town built on a hill cannot be hidden.
The Lord watches over all who love him.
Let us fix our eyes on Jesus, the pioneer and perfecter of faith.
For the Lord is good and his love endures forever; his faithfulness continues through all generations.
I will instruct you and teach you in the way you should go; I will counsel you with my loving eye on you.
The Lord is slow to anger, abounding in love and forgiving sin and rebellion.
In your presence there is fullness of joy; at your right hand are pleasures forevermore.
He who dwells in the shelter of the Most High will rest in the shadow of the Almighty.
The Lord is my strength and my song; he has given me victory.
Every good and perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of the heavenly lights.
The Lord has done great things for us, and we are filled with joy.
He will not let your foot slip — he who watches over you will not slumber.
Whoever does not love does not know God, because God is love.
Let everything that has breath praise the Lord.
The Lord himself goes before you and will be with you; he will never leave you nor forsake you.
Blessed are the pure in heart, for they will see God.
The Lord is my helper; I will not be afraid. What can mere mortals do to me?
Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good. His love endures forever.
Those who trust in the Lord are like Mount Zion, which cannot be shaken but endures forever.
Honor your father and your mother, so that you may live long in the land.
My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.
The eternal God is your refuge, and underneath are the everlasting arms.
A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for a time of adversity.
But the Lord is faithful, and he will strengthen you and protect you from the evil one.
The Lord has established his throne in heaven, and his kingdom rules over all.
For God did not send his Son into the world to condemn the world, but to save the world through him.
Be kind and compassionate to one another, forgiving each other, just as in Christ God forgave you.
I lift up my eyes to the mountains — where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord.
I have told you these things, so that in me you may have peace. In this world you will have trouble. But take heart! I have overcome the world.
The Lord is near to all who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
Take my yoke upon you and learn from me, for I am gentle and humble in heart.
Do not let your hearts be troubled. You believe in God; believe also in me.
Wait for the Lord; be strong and take heart and wait for the Lord.
He who finds a wife finds what is good and receives favor from the Lord.
Blessed are the merciful, for they will be shown mercy.
The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusts in him, and he helps me.
Humble yourselves before the Lord, and he will lift you up.
I sought the Lord, and he answered me; he delivered me from all my fears.
For we are God's handiwork, created in Christ Jesus to do good works.
Blessed are those who mourn, for they will be comforted.
Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly, teaching and admonishing one another in all wisdom.
How beautiful on the mountains are the feet of those who bring good news.
Do not be afraid or terrified because of them, for the Lord your God goes with you.
Great is your faithfulness; your mercies begin afresh each morning.
He gives power to the faint, and to him who has no might he increases strength.
My sheep listen to my voice; I know them, and they follow me.
The Lord is my shepherd; I have all that I need.
Let your conversation be always full of grace, seasoned with salt.
Not by might nor by power, but by my Spirit, says the Lord Almighty.
Draw near to God, and he will draw near to you.
I have loved you with an everlasting love; I have drawn you with unfailing kindness.
The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want. He makes me lie down in green pastures.
My God shall supply all your needs according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus.
But blessed is the one who trusts in the Lord, whose confidence is in him.
From the rising of the sun to the place where it sets, the name of the Lord is to be praised.
Fathers, do not exasperate your children; instead, bring them up in the training and instruction of the Lord.
The Lord upholds all who fall and lifts up all who are bowed down.
Walk in obedience to all that the Lord your God has commanded you.
For I am convinced that neither death nor life can separate us from the love of God.
Light shines on the godly, and joy on those whose hearts are right.
Blessed are the peacemakers, for they will be called children of God.
Anyone who loves their brother and sister lives in the light, and there is nothing in them to make them stumble.
For the Lord is the great God, the great King above all gods.
And this is the confidence that we have toward him, that if we ask anything according to his will he hears us.
The Lord is righteous; he loves righteousness; the upright shall behold his face.
Do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewal of your mind.
He will yet fill your mouth with laughter and your lips with shouts of joy.
I will sing of your strength, in the morning I will sing of your love.
I have set the Lord always before me. Because he is at my right hand, I will not be shaken.
Let us hold unswervingly to the hope we profess, for he who promised is faithful.
The Lord reigns, let the earth be glad; let the distant shores rejoice.
You are my hiding place; you will protect me from trouble and surround me with songs of deliverance.
The Lord is compassionate and gracious, slow to anger, abounding in love.
Have I not commanded you? Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged.
Blessed is the nation whose God is the Lord, the people he chose for his inheritance.
The Lord will fight for you; you need only to be still.
Therefore encourage one another and build each other up, just as in fact you are doing.
You will keep in perfect peace those whose minds are steadfast, because they trust in you.
For we live by faith, not by sight.
Let the morning bring me word of your unfailing love, for I have put my trust in you.
The Lord your God will personally go ahead of you. He will neither fail you nor abandon you.
My flesh and my heart may fail, but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever.
I sought the Lord, and he answered me and delivered me from all my fears.
The Lord is good to all; he has compassion on all he has made.
Anyone who does not love does not know God, because God is love.
Let us not give up meeting together, as some are in the habit of doing, but encouraging one another.
So whether you eat or drink or whatever you do, do it all for the glory of God.
For the Lord your God is the one who goes with you to fight for you against your enemies.
The Lord will guide you always; he will satisfy your needs in a sun-scorched land.
I will not leave you as orphans; I will come to you.
Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
What a privilege to carry everything to God in prayer.
But the Lord stands at your side to help you.
Those who know your name trust in you, for you, Lord, have never forsaken those who seek you.
The Lord does not look at the things people look at. People look at the outward appearance, but the Lord looks at the heart.
You are the God who performs miracles; you display your power among the peoples.
Oh, how great are God's riches and wisdom and knowledge! How impossible it is for us to understand his decisions and his ways!
Praise the Lord, my soul; all my inmost being, praise his holy name.
The Lord is faithful to all his promises and loving toward all he has made.
For it is God who works in you to will and to act in order to fulfill his good purpose.
Because of the Lord's great love we are not consumed, for his compassions never fail.
The Lord turns my darkness into light.
For where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.
God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power and of love and of a sound mind.
Though the mountains be shaken and the hills be removed, yet my unfailing love for you will not be shaken.
The Lord is the everlasting God, the Creator of the ends of the earth. He will not grow tired or weary.
Whoever walks in integrity walks securely, but whoever takes crooked paths will be found out.
The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not be in want.
Behold, God is my salvation; I will trust, and will not be afraid.
The Lord is good, a stronghold in the day of trouble; he knows those who take refuge in him.
Do everything in love.
I will give thanks to you, Lord, with all my heart; I will tell of all your wonderful deeds.
Blessed is the man who perseveres under trial, because when he has stood the test, he will receive the crown of life.
You are my refuge and my shield; I have put my hope in your word.
In the same way, the Spirit helps us in our weakness. We do not know what we ought to pray for, but the Spirit himself intercedes for us.
I was glad when they said to me, Let us go to the house of the Lord.
The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing.
For the Spirit of God has made me; the breath of the Almighty gives me life.
Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be pleasing to you, O Lord, my rock and my redeemer.
No weapon formed against you shall prosper.
A man of many companions may come to ruin, but there is a friend who sticks closer than a brother.
The Lord your God is in your midst; he is a warrior who can deliver.
I am with you always, to the very end of the age.
My God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus.
The Lord is my light and my salvation — whom shall I fear? The Lord is the stronghold of my life.
Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord, not for human masters.
I will not forget you. See, I have engraved you on the palms of my hands.
The Lord delights in those who fear him, who put their hope in his unfailing love.
He tends his flock like a shepherd: he gathers the lambs in his arms and carries them close to his heart.
And God is able to bless you abundantly, so that in all things at all times, having all that you need, you will abound in every good work.
Let us run with perseverance the race marked out for us, fixing our eyes on Jesus.
My help comes from the Lord, who made heaven and earth.
Yet I am always with you; you hold me by my right hand.
The Lord reigns forever; he has established his throne for judgment.
Serve wholeheartedly, as if you were serving the Lord, not people.
I will sing to the Lord, for he is highly exalted. The horse and its rider he has hurled into the sea.
The Lord is compassionate and gracious, slow to anger, abounding in love.
He who began a good work in you will bring it to completion at the day of Jesus Christ.
Blessed is the one who reads aloud the words of this prophecy and blessed are those who hear it.
But I trust in your unfailing love; my heart rejoices in your salvation.
Be still before the Lord and wait patiently for him.
The Lord himself will fight for you. Just stay calm.
And after you have suffered a little while, the God of all grace will himself restore, confirm, strengthen, and establish you.
Even in darkness light dawns for the upright, for those who are gracious and compassionate and righteous.
Blessed are those who find wisdom, those who gain understanding.
The name of the Lord is a strong tower; the righteous man runs into it and is safe.
For his anger lasts only a moment, but his favor lasts a lifetime; weeping may stay for the night, but rejoicing comes in the morning.
Above all else, guard your heart, for everything you do flows from it.
The Lord your God will bless you in all your work and in everything you put your hand to.
I will praise you, Lord, with all my heart; before the gods I will sing your praise.
For I am the Lord your God who takes hold of your right hand and says to you, Do not fear; I will help you.
Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, present your requests to God.
The Lord will keep you from all harm — he will watch over your life.
How precious to me are your thoughts, God! How vast is the sum of them!
Trust in the Lord with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding.
Commit your work to the Lord, and your plans will be established.
The Lord has appeared of old to me, saying: Yes, I have loved you with an everlasting love.
The steps of a man are established by the Lord, when he delights in his way.
You, Lord, are my shepherd. I will never be in need.
Let us then approach God's throne of grace with confidence, so that we may receive mercy and find grace.
The Lord is near to all who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
Be on your guard; stand firm in the faith; be courageous; be strong.
From the fullness of his grace we have all received one blessing after another.
For the Lord is good and his love endures forever.
So we do not lose heart. Though our outer self is wasting away, our inner self is being renewed day by day.
The Lord is my refuge and my fortress, my God, in whom I trust.
Give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God's will for you in Christ Jesus.
Now may the God of peace fill you with all joy and peace in believing.
The Lord upholds the righteous.
How great is the love the Father has lavished on us, that we should be called children of God!
And my God will meet all your needs according to the riches of his glory in Christ Jesus.
A cheerful heart is good medicine, but a crushed spirit dries up the bones.
With all my heart I will praise you, O Lord my God. I will give glory to your name forever.
Ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; knock, and it will be opened to you.
Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life.
Strength and dignity are her clothing, and she laughs at the time to come.
The Lord will protect you from all danger; he will preserve your life.
So humble yourselves under the mighty power of God, and at the right time he will lift you up in honor.
Every word of God proves true; he is a shield to those who take refuge in him.
I am the living bread that came down from heaven. Whoever eats this bread will live forever.
The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom, and knowledge of the Holy One is understanding.
He has shown you, O mortal, what is good. And what does the Lord require of you? To act justly and to love mercy and to walk humbly with your God.
You are my lamp, O Lord; the Lord lightens my darkness.
The Lord is not slow to fulfill his promise as some count slowness, but is patient toward you.
I have come that they may have life, and have it to the full.
For by grace you have been saved through faith. And this is not your own doing; it is the gift of God.
The Lord will open to you his good treasury, the heavens, to give the rain to your land in its season.
He has made everything beautiful in its time.
Stand firm. Let nothing move you. Always give yourselves fully to the work of the Lord.
The Lord is my strength and my defense; he has become my salvation.
I can do all things through him who strengthens me.
This is the confidence we have in approaching God: that if we ask anything according to his will, he hears us.
The Lord your God is in your midst, a mighty one who will save.
Even the darkness will not be dark to you; the night will shine like the day.
In everything give thanks; for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus for you.
The earth is the Lord's, and everything in it, the world, and all who live in it.
For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you.
If you remain in me and my words remain in you, ask whatever you wish, and it will be done for you.
The Lord bless you and keep you; the Lord make his face shine on you and be gracious to you.
Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.
I will praise the Lord all my life; I will sing praise to my God as long as I live.
Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
The Lord is my shepherd and I have everything I need.
Devote yourselves to prayer, being watchful and thankful.
Greater love has no one than this: to lay down one's life for one's friends.
The Lord is my helper, and I will not be afraid.
Your ears will hear a word behind you saying, This is the way; walk in it.
I will sing of the mercies of the Lord forever; with my mouth will I make known your faithfulness to all generations.
Now to him who is able to do far more abundantly than all that we ask or think, according to the power at work within us.
The Lord is faithful in all his words and kind in all his works.
Let us be thankful, and so worship God acceptably with reverence and awe.
Though I walk in the midst of trouble, you preserve my life.
For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me drink, I was a stranger and you welcomed me.
The Lord is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear?
Arise, shine, for your light has come, and the glory of the Lord rises upon you.
Every good gift and every perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of lights.
You have turned my mourning into joyful dancing. You have taken away my clothes of mourning and clothed me with joy.
Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good! His faithful love endures forever.
O give thanks to the Lord, call upon His name; make known His deeds among the peoples.
The Lord is on my side; I will not fear. What can man do to me?
I will give thanks to the Lord because of his righteousness; I will sing the praises of the name of the Lord Most High.
Enter his gates with thanksgiving and his courts with praise; give thanks to him and praise his name.
Oh, the depth of the riches and wisdom and knowledge of God!
The Lord has done great things for us, and we are filled with joy.
For to us a child is born, to us a son is given, and the government will be on his shoulders.
The Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us. We have seen his glory.
She will give birth to a son, and you are to give him the name Jesus, because he will save his people from their sins.
Do not be afraid. I bring you good news that will cause great joy for all the people.
For to you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, who is Christ the Lord.
The virgin will conceive and give birth to a son, and they will call him Immanuel — God with us.
And suddenly there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly host praising God and saying, Glory to God in the highest.
But when the fullness of time had come, God sent forth his Son, born of woman.
The Lord himself will give you a sign: The virgin will conceive and give birth to a son.
And he will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.
His name shall be called Jesus. He will be great and will be called the Son of the Most High.
Arise, shine, for your light has come, and the glory of the Lord rises upon you.
For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish.
The Light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it.
In him was life, and that life was the light of all mankind.
Today in the town of David a Savior has been born to you; he is the Messiah, the Lord.
But Mary treasured up all these things and pondered them in her heart.
The hopes and fears of all the years are met in thee tonight.
For to us a child is born, to us a son is given; and his name shall be called Prince of Peace.
She gave birth to her firstborn, a son. She wrapped him in cloths and placed him in a manger.
Where is the one who has been born king of the Jews? We saw his star when it rose and have come to worship him.
And they came with haste and found Mary and Joseph, and the baby lying in a manger.
After Jesus was born in Bethlehem in Judea, during the time of King Herod, Magi from the east came to Jerusalem.
And Joseph also went up from Galilee, out of the city of Nazareth, to be born with Mary, his betrothed wife.
For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, which is Christ the Lord.
Thanks be to God for his indescribable gift!
The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want. He makes me lie down in green pastures.
But as many as received him, to them gave he power to become the sons of God.
For the grace of God has appeared that offers salvation to all people.
Sovereign Lord, as you have promised, you may now dismiss your servant in peace.
The Lord bless you and keep you; the Lord make his face shine on you and be gracious to you; the Lord turn his face toward you and give you peace.
